rulings.Rulings: The minutes from the hearing on June 8, 2011 show that Counsel was directed to file a declaration. By Local Rule (14.6.B.), all supplemental documents must be filed 3 court days prior to the hearing date. No declaration is on file as of Monday, June 20, 2011 at 4:00 p.m., so this matter is continued to July 6, 2011.
